chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of the Followers of Different Religions

text: 5724 - وَ رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنِ اَلْحَسَنِ بْنِ صَالِحٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : " اَلْمُسْلِمُ يَحْجُبُ اَلْكَافِرَ وَ يَرِثُهُ وَ اَلْكَافِرُ لاَ يَحْجُبُ اَلْمُؤْمِنَ وَ لاَ يَرِثُهُ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5724 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Al-Hasan ibn Salih from Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) who said:
"A Muslim prevents a disbeliever from inheriting and inherits from him, but a disbeliever neither prevents a believer from inheriting nor does he inherit from him."
